Headline: Ireland's GRAI begins issuing B2C remote betting licences from July 1, 2026 — brand-new regulated iGaming market with no established crypto payment processor and all operator payment stacks being built from scratch
Why It Matters: Ireland's GRAI started issuing remote betting licences July 1, 2026, opening the latest brand-new regulated iGaming market — a direct parallel to Alberta's July 13 go-live tracked as HIGH in this sheet. All licensed operators are selecting payment stacks from scratch under GRAI's Gambling Regulation Act 2024. Ireland has no dominant crypto payment processor established yet, and unlike Finland, GRAI places no ban on crypto payment solutions. Operators include Flutter/Paddy Power brands (domestic incumbents), UK-facing operators, and European groups — all requiring EUR-compatible payment infrastructure where GWC's EUR SEPA/SWIFT off-ramp is a natural fit alongside USDT multichain deposits for international player acquisition.
Suggested Action: Run batch_lead_sourcing for Ireland GRAI-licensed iGaming operators — prioritise Flutter/Paddy Power Ireland entities, BoyleSports, and bet365 Ireland before incumbent processors lock in payment contracts

Headline: Coinbase wins UK FCA and MiFID II authorization for stocks and derivatives alongside crypto (July 7, 2026) — advancing its 'Everything Exchange' strategy and competing directly with UK Forex/CFD brokers for retail clients
Why It Matters: Coinbase's MiFID II UK authorization for equities and crypto derivatives makes it the first major crypto-native exchange offering both crypto and traditional instruments under FCA supervision, now able to attract UK Forex broker clients directly. UK CFD and spread betting brokers face an accelerating threat from Coinbase's all-in-one exchange model. GWC outreach angle: frame GWC's B2B USDT payment infrastructure as the tool that lets brokers retain crypto-native clients in-house before Coinbase captures them via the 'Everything Exchange' self-serve model.
Suggested Action: Consider referencing Coinbase UK FCA expansion in outreach to UK Forex/CFD brokers without a crypto deposit option — frame GWC's B2B USDT deposit rails as client retention infrastructure before Coinbase captures crypto-native broker clients
